fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket blockers <id> returns an ordered upstream blocker tree with all deep blockers and emphasized frontier leaves. 2. ticket unblocked-by <id> returns an ordered downstream tree that preserves direct parent-child structure beneath the queried root and highlights frontier leaves. 3. Machine-readable and human-readable output both render nested tree structure clearly instead of flattening results into generic lists. 4. Focused integration tests cover nested JSON shape, sibling ordering, and human-readable rendering.
fields.title: [ticket-cli] Add blockers command and nested tree rendering
